title: Healthy Water
description: Now you can drink water to recover half a thigh of food and half a heart!
body:
![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Healthy_Water/MP_HEALTHY_WATER_Header.webp) Currently it is a simple mod that aims to improve the gaming experience, adding a new type of food that we have had since the beginning, our beloved water! Now, players will be able to fill a simple glass jar with water, then drink it and recover half a thigh of food, as well as another half a heart. It's that simple! ### Do you need a server to play with your friends?

For exceptional server hosting services, look no further than **[BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)**. Of course, you can install all the mods or modpacks you want, and their support team is always available to help you. **[With the code "Lupin" you will get a 25% discount! Click here!](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)** ![Summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Healthy_Water/MP_HEALTHY_WATER_Summary.webp) What is more basic than drinking water? Actually, in most video games you can drink water, and that usually gives you a little reward... Now in Minecraft you can too! When you drink water, you'll get back both half a thigh of food and half a heart! It has always been said that you have to drink water to survive... and although it won't be a requirement, it will certainly help you! ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Healthy_Water/MP_HEALTHY_WATER_Faq.webp) ### Does it work on servers? ### Sure! Remember that the best way to play with mods and friends is with BisectHosting, and by **[clicking on this link you can get a 25% discount](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin).** ### Can this mod be used in modpacks? ### Of course! As long as it is published only on Modrinth or CurseForge. Uploading it to any other platform would be violating our rights and is not allowed at all. However, we are really grateful if you consider adding it to your Modrinth or CurseForge modpack. If you need any small changes or have any questions, contact us! ![Screenshots](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Healthy_Water/MP_HEALTHY_WATER_Screenshots.webp) ![Healthy Water](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bef70af9c3e5ca7cabcb8c957163def003be0d4f.jpeg) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
